# Cherax Wiki

> A fan made collection of guides for the Cherax Mod Menu for Grand Theft Auto V Online.

Website: https://cherax.wiki

## Key pages
- [Purchasing Cherax](https://cherax.wiki/purchasing/purchasing-cherax/)
- [Prime](https://cherax.wiki/purchasing/prime/)
- [Getting Full Access to Channels](https://cherax.wiki/purchasing/getting-access-to-channels/)
- [Getting Started](https://cherax.wiki/purchasing/getting-started/)
- [Playing Online](https://cherax.wiki/purchasing/advertising/)
- [Reselling Cherax](https://cherax.wiki/purchasing/reselling-cherax/)
- [Recovery Information](https://cherax.wiki/recovery/recoveries/)
- [Recovery Services](https://cherax.wiki/recovery/recovery-services/)
- [DLCs (Vehicles and Peds)](https://cherax.wiki/customization/dlcs/)
- [Getting Luas](https://cherax.wiki/customization/luas/)
- [Outfits](https://cherax.wiki/customization/outfits/)
- [Themes](https://cherax.wiki/customization/themes/)
- [Modded Vehicles](https://cherax.wiki/customization/vehicles/)
- [Writing Lua Scripts](https://cherax.wiki/guides/creating-luas/)
- [Using Cherax on Linux](https://cherax.wiki/guides/using-cherax-on-linux/)
- [Wiki Contributions](https://cherax.wiki/contributing/contributions/)
- [Donations](https://cherax.wiki/contributing/donations/)
- [Wall of GOATs](https://cherax.wiki/contributing/wallofgoats/)
